chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1402 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 21.11.2016. None present for petitioner. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel. = None present for the petitioner. The order sheet shows that till date neither any cost has been paid by the petitioner nor the basic formalities are complied with enabling the office to proceed further. On last date of hearing, the petitioner side did not appear. Petitioner’s dispute appears to be of matrimonial nature and the petitioner lady is facing threats from private respondents. Today, the parawise comments have been filed by the learned State Counsel and according to which no harassment is caused by the official respondents but they have undertaken to provide legal protection to the petitioner if they are approached with such a request by her. Be that as it may, this petition is disposed of with the directions that the official respondents will provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law and will ensure that private respondents do not cause any harassment to the petitioner. JUDGE Shahid
